evals.prompt: I have a PRD for a new multi-tenant billing system at docs/prds/billing-v2.md. It covers subscription management, metered billing, invoicing, and payment processing. Analyze it and create a full implementation plan with epics, stories, and tasks. I need dependency ordering and estimates.
evals.expected_output: Claude reads the PRD, extracts features, classifies priorities, breaks into epic/story/task hierarchy with estimates, assigns skills, generates PROJECT.md and creates tasks in ohno.
expectations: Reads and analyzes the PRD document
Assigns appropriate skills to features (api-design, database-design, etc.)
Flags ambiguities or unclear requirements before planning

evals.prompt: I've got this concept doc from the founder about adding a marketplace to our platform. It's pretty high-level and vague - just says 'vendors should be able to list products, buyers can browse and purchase, we need reviews and ratings.' Can you analyze it, flag what's missing, and create a structured plan?
evals.expected_output: Claude identifies the vague requirements, flags specific ambiguities (pricing model? vendor onboarding? payment split?), asks clarifying questions or makes noted assumptions, then produces a structured plan.
expectations: Identifies the input as a vague/high-level concept requiring clarification
Flags specific missing requirements (pricing, payments, vendor verification, etc.)
Either asks clarifying questions or documents assumptions explicitly
Still produces a structured breakdown despite ambiguity
Marks uncertain areas or assumptions in the plan

evals.prompt: I want to do a headless planning session on the API migration PRD at docs/prds/api-v3-migration.md. Auto-decide on ambiguities, skip the review, just generate the full plan and task breakdown into ohno.
evals.expected_output: Claude runs in headless mode: auto-decides ambiguities with logging, dispatches yokay-planner, generates full plan without interactive review, creates all tasks in ohno.
expectations: Recognizes headless mode request (auto-decide, no interactive review)
Documents or logs auto-decisions on ambiguities rather than asking
Dispatches yokay-planner agent or follows planner workflow
Skips the interactive plan review session
